creator: dam@my.gd
text:
Vladimir, would PORTREVISION help in differentiating between the vulnerable 0.9.18 released in February 2016, and the 0.9.18 from the latest commit hash ?

I've set PORTREVISION to 20160916 in the Makefile [1] so package users have an idea of what 0.9.18 version they're getting.



[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=178857
